inline_comments.message:
this file is used to release the robot pod
however the tests executed in CI do not use the robot pod but xtesting dockers that are build daily. So as far as the patch is merged, the dockers will include the testuite change you made.

To get a 1.7.4, I need to update this file and create a new release file.

in other words, we can decorelate the new test and the creation of a new release for the robot pod. This change could be done in another patch

Before you merge this change, we probably want to have the OOM change to robot_properties.py submitted and merged.  Otherwise the xtesting docker images that pull the testsuite repo will try to run the new test case and will not find the necessary global variables.
Jack - Can you submit the relevant OOM change (for robot_properties.py) and link to this submission
